title: Care Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Care Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Care Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Care Hospitals:
Care Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals!
